text: And it is said that the Prophet drew the line of the trench of the generality of the allies, and cut out for each ten (companions), forty cubits (to dig). The Emigrants and the Helpers were needy regarding Salman™®, and he™ was a strong man. The Emigrants said, ‘Salman™ is from us’, and the Helpers said, ‘Salmanis from us'.
